subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the divine breaths that wafted from the gardens of the Most Glorious Kingdom, verily hath a gentle breeze stirred [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من انجذب من نفحات القدس التی انتشرت من ریاض الملکوت الابهی قد سرت نسمه
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God
